political.s: FEC: $2K PAC donations; 0% to Republican, 100% to Democratic committees.

wiki.parent: Stanley Black & Decker, Sears, Sears Holdings Corporation
wiki.extract: Craftsman is a line of tools, lawn and garden equipment, and work wear. Originally a house brand established by Sears, the brand is now owned by Stanley Black & Decker.

fec.committeeName: INTERNATIONAL UNION OF BRICKLAYERS AND ALLIED CRAFTSMAN POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEE

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee fell from a step ladder, resulting in a little fingertip amputation that required hospitalization.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by falling object or equipment, n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: Two employees were looking at a piece of granite stored on a wooden A-frame. The piece of granite slipped off the A-frame and landed on one employee's foot, causing a partial amputation to a toe.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Chest, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall from collapsing structure or equipment 6 to 10 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was working on a garage/bay door when the ladder he was standing on crumpled beneath him, causing him to fall approximately 8 feet. He suffered broken ribs and a back injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level 11 to 15 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was accessing the second floor with a ladder when he lost his grip and fell off the ladder more than 10 ft., landing on his feet and suffering a compound fracture to his ankle.

topHazards.label: The assembly instructions can cause consumers to incorrectly attach the bottom portion of the tiller/cultivator upside down, causing the tines to rotate toward…
The head of the sledgehammers can loosen prematurely and detach unexpectedly during use, posing an impact injury hazard to the user.
The riding mowers can fail to come to a complete stop and continue to move at a speed of about one mile per hour when the clutch/brake pedal is fully depressed…
The chain saw can start unexpectedly without operation of the switch when the extension cord adaptor is connected upside down, posing a laceration hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Black & Decker Recalls CRAFTSMAN V20 Cordless Tillers/Cultivators Due to Laceration Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves CRAFTSMAN Model CMCTL320B V20 Cordless Tillers/Cultivators. The model number is located on the underside of the upper handle. "CRAFTSMAN" is located on the handle and the bottom portion. The tillers/cultivators are red and black. Only products with UPC number 885911843430 on the side of the produc…
hazards: The assembly instructions can cause consumers to incorrectly attach the bottom portion of the tiller/cultivator upside down, causing the tines to rotate toward…
injuries: The firm has received one report of incorrect attachment of the bottom portion of the unit. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Stanley Black & Decker Recalls 2.2 Million DeWALT, Stanley and Craftsman Fiberglass Sledgehammers Due to Impact Injury Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves certain DeWALT, Stanley FATMAX and Craftsman Fiberglass Sledgehammers. The recalled sledgehammers weigh between 2 and 12 pounds and range between 14" and 36" in length. The DeWALT sledgehammers are yellow and black, the Stanley sledgehammers are yellow and black and the Craftsman sledgehammers are…
hazards: The head of the sledgehammers can loosen prematurely and detach unexpectedly during use, posing an impact injury hazard to the user.
injuries: The firm has received 192 reports of the sledgehammer's head detaching, including two reported injuries to consumers' face and head.
products: DeWALT, Stanley and Craftsman Fiberglass Sledgehammers
units: About 2.2 million (In addition, about 53,000 in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: MTD Recalls Craftsman and Troy-Bilt Riding Lawn Mowers Due to Crash Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Craftsman 30" mini and Troy-Bilt TB30 riding lawn mowers. The lawn mowers are red and black. Troy-Bilt or Craftsman are printed on the front column. Recalled lawn mowers are not marked with a green X, were manufactured from July 20, 2021 through December 17, 2022, and have serial numbers 1G20MB200…
hazards: The riding mowers can fail to come to a complete stop and continue to move at a speed of about one mile per hour when the clutch/brake pedal is fully depressed…
products: Craftsman 30" Mini and Troy-Bilt TB30 Riding Lawn Mowers

sampleRecalls.title: Black & Decker Recalls CRAFTSMAN 10-Inch Corded Chain Saws Due to Laceration Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves CRAFTSMAN Model CMECSP610 10-inch corded chain saws with extension poles. The chain saws are red with black and gray accents. The name "CRAFTSMAN" is on the cutting bar and the motor end cap. The model number CMECSP610 is on the label on top of the motor. Only chain saws with date codes of 2019-40…
hazards: The chain saw can start unexpectedly without operation of the switch when the extension cord adaptor is connected upside down, posing a laceration hazard.
injuries: CRAFTSMAN has received one report of the recalled chain saw starting without operation of the switch causing a laceration injury to a consumer.
products: CRAFTSMAN® CMECSP610 10-inch corded chain saws with extension poles

sampleRecalls.title: Craftsman Portable Table Saws Made by Rexon Recalled Due to Laceration and Impact Injury Hazards; Sold Exclusively at Sears
sampleRecalls.description: The recall involves model number 137.415030 Craftsman brand 10-inch table saws. The table saws sit on a black metal foldable stand. "15 AMP 10-inch table saw," "Sears Brands Mgt. Corp." and the model and serial numbers are printed on a silver label on the front. Serial numbers included in the recall begin with the fol…
hazards: The table saw's stand can collapse unexpectedly, posing laceration and impact injury hazards to the operator.
injuries: The firm has received 11 reports of the table saw collapsing, including nine reports of injuries to fingers and hands, including broken bones, lacerations, a shoulder strain, and a partial fingernail…
